reference: Hello, I am going for an operation on September four, two thousand and twelve, as I have pre-cancerous cells that need to be removed and treated. I started with a light chesty cough on Thursday, but I am hardly coughing at all and just feel it in my chest. Also, I have hot sweats too. I have been taking Day and Night Nurse from the pharmacy, and it seems to be helping. Would I still be okay to go ahead with my operation, or do I need to call the doctor and ask, or cancel?
text: Hello, I am going for an operation on September 4, 2012, as I have precancerous cells that need to be removed and treated. I started with a light chesty cough on Thursday, but I am hardly coughing at all and just feel it in my chest. Also, I have hot sweats too. I have been taking day and night nurse from the pharmacy, and it seems to be helping. Would I still be okay to go ahead with my operation? Or do I need to call the doctor and ask? Or cancel?
